top3.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM results r
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
WHERE ra.year = 2008 
  AND ra.name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
  AND r.statusId = 1;

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM results r
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
WHERE ra.year = 2008 
  AND ra.name = 'Australian Grand Prix' 
  AND r.statusId IN (
    SELECT statusId 
    FROM status 
    WHERE status = 'Finished'
  );

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM results r
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
WHERE ra.year = 2008 
  AND ra.name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
  AND r.statusId = 1;

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM results r
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
WHERE ra.year = 2008 
  AND ra.name = 'Australian Grand Prix' 
  AND r.statusId IN (
    SELECT statusId 
    FROM status 
    WHERE status = 'Finished'
  );

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM results r
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
JOIN status s ON r.statusId = s.statusId
WHERE ra.year = 2008 
  AND ra.name = 'Australian Grand Prix' 
  AND s.status = 'Finished';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM results r
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
WHERE ra.year = 2008 
  AND ra.name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
  AND r.statusId = 1;

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM results r
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
WHERE ra.year = 2008 
  AND ra.name = 'Australian Grand Prix' 
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM status s 
    WHERE s.statusId = r.statusId 
      AND s.status = 'Finished'
  );

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM results r
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
WHERE ra.year = 2008 
  AND ra.name = 'Australian Grand Prix' 
  AND r.statusId IN (
    SELECT statusId 
    FROM status 
    WHERE status = 'Finished'
  );

final.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM results r
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
WHERE ra.year = 2008 
  AND ra.name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
  AND r.statusId = 1;
